{{Quote|And the rest of them are fine? Turpimir? Lord Gale? Kiel Charny himself?|Hoth|<ref name="JvS" />}}
'''Turpimir''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served in the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the [[Ruusan campaign]], and Turpimir died in the final battles in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].<ref name="JvS" /> The fourth planet of the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Hoth's Brand system]] was later named [[Turpimir (planet)|Turpimir]] in honor of the fallen Jedi.<ref name="Kyle Katarn's Tale">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale5|text=Light and Dark: Kyle Katarn's Tale, Mission 5|int=Kyle Katarn's Tale}}</ref>
